DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE OBJECTS TO MULTIPLE TRIAL SETTINGS UNDER UNDER MORE THAN ONE CASE NUMBER AND PLFT'S ABSENCE ON DATE OF TRIAL. DEFT REQUESTS THE MATTER BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
